lesson: Portfolio Show & Transcript Close — Transcript Close
essential_question: Looking back across all 30 lessons — what's the honest, full picture of a year of geometry?
objective: Review mastery across all 30 lessons, confirm the Transcript record, and reflect on the year's full journey.

content.prompt: Forty weeks, thirty lessons, four capstones. Before we look at any record — what's the one word you'd use to describe this year of geometry?

success_criteria.text: I can review my mastery record across all 30 lessons and name specific strengths and gaps
I can confirm my Transcript record is accurate
I can give an honest overall self-rating for the year, with reasoning

compass.note: Curriculum/Geometry/The Salas Compass/2026-W40 Portfolio Show & Transcript Close.md

questions.prompt: Open [[Records/Mastery & Progress]] and scan all 30 lessons. List any lesson still below Proficient.
For each unit (01, 02, 03), name the one lesson you're most confident in and the one you'd want a refresher on before your next math course.
Open [[Records/Transcript]] and confirm your name, the course title, and the credit awarded are all correct.
Overall, how would you rate your mastery of Geometry this year — Emerging, Proficient, or Mastered — and why, in one sentence?
Exit: write one paragraph in The Salas Compass looking back at Week 1 you and forward to whatever comes next. What are you proudest of?
